scripts.build: pnpm run build:ui && uv build && pnpm run verify:wheel
scripts.build:ui: pnpm exec turbo build --filter=sqlrooms-cli-app... && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const src=path.resolve('..','..','apps','sqlrooms-cli-ui','dist');const dst=path.resolve('sqlrooms','web','static');fs.rmSync(dst,{recursive:true,force:true});fs.mkdirSync(dst,{recursive:true});fs.cpSync(src,dst,{recursive:true});console.log('Copied UI bundle to',dst);"
scripts.prerelease: pnpm run build && uv run pytest && uv run ruff check && uv run ruff format --check
scripts.release: pnpm run build && uvx twine upload --skip-existing ../dist/sqlrooms-*
